name: SBC Medispa White Supplement
pros: High individual review rating (4.73★) suggests strong efficacy
Celebrity endorsement and clinic reputation add prestige factor
cons: Very limited review count (only 15 reviews)—insufficient data to assess real reliability
Premium pricing (¥5,860) without proven superior results vs. established brands
shortDescription: Clinical-grade white supplement from Shonandai Beauty Clinic with limited but strong reviews.
review: SBC Medispa White Supplement rides the prestige of Japan's largest beauty clinic chain, but proceed with caution. While the 4.73★ rating looks impressive, only 15 reviews means limited real-world evidence. At ¥5,860, you're paying a clinic premium without the track record of Fujifilm Astalift or the value of HAKUA. Better as an optional add-on to clinic treatments than a standalone purchase.
